pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take:
**Look at me, Ghost Pepper and Bubba G, your fantasy picks are a national tragedy.**

Devin, I can already see you clutching that Ghost Pepper bottle like it’s a tactical manual. But let me tell you something: drafting Bosnia was a surefire sign of an existential crisis. Your USA team just got rolled by Turkey, so struggling against France is a matter of course; it's not even noteworthy, like the sun rising or Rafe making a bad pick. And speaking of Bubba G, look at you, counting on France like it’s 1994 all over again. Your track record shows it, with a mere 22 points. Have you mistaken French flair for American grit? The only thing you and Ghost Pepper are going to accomplish today is determining who can lose a game more spectacularly! Mark my words, neither of you will have a team standing after Norwegians and French finish their business.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach Faces Must-Win Saudi Arabia Match to Escape Last Place
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy banks on Kingdom's unpredictability to salvage dignity.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin's Winning Strategy in Doubt as Spain Prepares for Uruguay
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper needs miracle to stay ahead in top spot tie.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner Hopes France Will Outshine Norway to Climb Standings
pundit_takes.subtitle: 'Bubba G' looks to his French squad to boost his rank.

pundit_takes.headline: Teen Manager Rafe Surprises Critics with Second Place Tactics
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Noisemaker's Germany loss barely dents his high-ranking standing.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner, your favorite status just got sucker-punched by a teenager with no clue.
Rafe's Tier-1 team, Germany, got decked by his own Tier-2 pick, Ecuador.
Devin, Rafe cleaned your clock twice; better hope he’s grounded next matchday.
Sim's predictions? More like coin flip chaos with Rafe rewriting reality.
